branch.branch_summary: Run a runtime-backed v8.3 direction review before opening the first Mission Control operator acceptance evidence implementation task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v8.2 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v8.3 Mission Control Operator Acceptance Evidence: make operator acceptance, rejection, clarification need, reproduction state, evidence path, and governance action visible in Mission Control without raw artifact reading.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Run a runtime-backed v8.3 direction review before opening the first Mission Control operator acceptance evidence implementation task.
